title: Durrës, Durrës — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

content:
Overview

Durrës is a city in Durrës with a population of 113,000. Albania’s second-largest city and main port on the Adriatic Sea, known for its ancient amphitheater, sandy beaches, and the Via Egnatia ruins.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
